Doubao vs Dify

Compare Doubao and Dify: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Doubao

ByteDance's AI assistant. Basic features are free, but recent controversy over charging has eroded user trust. Free tier still includes AI image generation.

Pros

  • ✓ByteDance ecosystem
  • ✓Multimodal
  • ✓Fast response

Cons

  • ✗Average creativity
  • ✗Complex tasks not as good
  • ✗Started charging May 2026

Key Features

Doubao model poweredMulti-turn chatImage understandingCode generationDocument summarySearch enhancedFree to use
View Details →

Dify

Open-source AI app development platform. Visual workflow orchestration, RAG engine, 100+ model integration. Community edition free and self-hostable, cloud free tier: 200 API calls/month.

Pros

  • ✓Open-source and self-hostable
  • ✓Visual workflow orchestration
  • ✓Supports 100+ models
  • ✓MIT license, commercial use allowed

Cons

  • ✗Requires technical background
  • ✗Cloud free tier is limited
  • ✗Paid plans are not cheap

Key Features

Visual AI WorkflowRAG EngineModel ManagementApp Publishing & APITeam CollaborationMonitoring & Analytics
View Details →
